channel.title: U Shaped on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in U Shaped on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: U-Shaped Kitchen Design with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 298 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 306 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen Style
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 74 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 120 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 227 sq. ft. item.title: U Shaped Lake House Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Engineered Wood Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 208 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Environ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet*, laminate and floating wood. The mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen and Kitchen Nook
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Hard Wood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 300 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design.

item.title: Kitchen and Kitchen Nook
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Glued Hardwood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 452 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: WarmlyYours Environ Easy Mats: “Add extra warmth and comfort to carpet, laminate and floating wood flooring with a WarmlyYours Environ Easy Mats™ under floor radiant heating system. Easy Mats are perfect for heating large areas easily and quickly, with no need for cuts and turns.

item.title: U Layout Hardwood Flooring
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Hardwood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 374 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Environ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet, laminate and floating wood. The heated mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible floor heating rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen and Kitchenette
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Hard Wood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 300 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Cable with Strips: “WarmlyYours TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) brings radiant warmth and comfort to any room. This free-form cable provides the ultimate in flexibility, making it easy to customize installation for rooms of any size and shape.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen Design
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Resilients, Vinyl and Luxury Vinyl Tile (LVT) Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 207 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.
